title: hudsonia ericoides subsp. intermedia
intro: Hudsonia ericoides subsp. intermedia, also known as Hudsonia or Golden Ragwort, is a subspecies of shrub native to the coastal regions of eastern North America. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. Its medicinal properties provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
